data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for peak vs off-peak booking windows.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement regarding peak vs off-peak booking windows. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations related to this specific requirement. While the linked use case mentions the need for peak vs off-peak booking windows, there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that this requirement is satisfied or that any gaps were identified in the current implementation.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of peak vs off-peak booking windows.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
